description: A customer wants to change their monthly payment due date from the 1st to the 15th of the month.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their current billing setup.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the customer's policy and current due date.

nodes.task_description: Explain how changing the date will affect their next payment (prorated amount).

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the one-time effect on the next bill.

nodes.task_description: Update the billing system with the new preferred payment date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully changes the due date in the system.
